title: El Mal Paso Canyon
description: A dramatic natural formation carved by centuries of water and wind, El Mal Paso offers hiking trails, panoramic views, and geological intrigue. It’s a favorite among locals for weekend adventures and quiet escapes into nature.

title: Huetamo Artisan Market
description: This colorful market showcases handmade goods from across Tierra Caliente — embroidered textiles, pottery, leatherwork, and regional snacks. It’s a lively hub where tradition meets creativity, perfect for finding unique souvenirs.

title: La Presita Eco Zone
description: A tranquil area near a small reservoir, ideal for kayaking, birdwatching, and picnics. Surrounded by native vegetation and open skies, it’s a peaceful spot to unwind and enjoy Huetamo’s natural charm.
